description: A supplier has notified the company of a new primary contact for handling purchase orders.

nodes.task_description: Locate the supplier's profile in the SRM system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully retrieves the correct supplier profile.

nodes.task_description: Navigate to the contacts section and add the new contact's details (name, email, phone).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent enters the new contact information accurately.

nodes.task_description: Set the new contact as the 'Primary' for purchase orders and archive the old contact.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the contact roles.
